content: 切换到这个分支 https://github.com/loonghao/rez-next/pull/72 把CI的这些错误解决，然后合并到main 分支

detail: Fetched PR #72 details from GitHub to understand the branch name and CI issues
git fetch origin --prune && git checkout fix/ci-custom-workflow-v3
Fetched CI workflow run details - identified Security Audit job failure with 3 vulnerabilities and 11 warnings
Read all 5 GitHub Actions workflow files, Cargo.toml, and Cargo.lock to understand project structure
cargo install cargo-audit && cargo audit - identified 3 vulnerabilities: RUSTSEC-2026-0007 (bytes 1.10.1), RUSTSEC-2026-0002 (lru 0.12.5 and 0.14.0)
Searched for RUSTSEC-2026-0002 fix - found lru 0.16.3 resolves the issue
Found lru usage across workspace: Cargo.toml (0.14.0), rez-next-cache (0.14), rez-next-package (0.12), rez-next-repository (workspace), rez-next-version (workspace)
Confirmed lru API usage: only LruCache imported in cache.rs and high_performance_scanner.rs
cargo update - updated Cargo.lock (bytes upgraded to >=1.11.1, lru unified to 0.16)
cargo check --workspace - Finished dev profile in 0.24s (success)
cargo audit - Exit code: 0, 0 vulnerabilities, 8 allowed warnings (unmaintained crates from rustpython-parser)
git add && git commit -m 'fix: resolve security audit vulnerabilities (RUSTSEC-2026-0007, RUSTSEC-2026-0002)'
git push origin fix/ci-custom-workflow-v3 - pushed to remote, CI #151 triggered
Confirmed CI #151 is In progress on GitHub Actions
